sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ رَنَا إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِتَشْتَرِيَ دَوَاءً لِلصُّدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Rana je otišla u apoteku da kupi lijek za glavobolju.
sentences.translationEn: Rana went to the pharmacy to buy medicine for a headache.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ إِذَا كَانَتْ تَأْخُذُ أَدْوِيَةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut je upitao da li uzima neke druge lijekove.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked if she was taking any other medicines.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لَا وَأَخَذَتِ الدَّوَاءَ الَّذِي أَوْصَى بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je ne i uzela lijek koji je preporučio.
sentences.translationEn: She said no and took the medicine he recommended.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلَتِ الدَّوَاءَ مَعَ كُوبٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ وَاسْتَرَاحَتْ.
sentences.translation: Uzela je lijek s čašom vode i odmorila se.
sentences.translationEn: She took the medicine with a glass of water and rested.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ سَاعَةٍ ذَهَبَ الصُّدَاعُ وَشَعَرَتْ بِتَحَسُّنٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon sat vremena glavobolja je prošla i osjetila se bolje.
sentences.translationEn: After an hour the headache went away and she felt better.
